data.title: BlueLinx accelerates digital transformation to enhance ecommerce
data.description: BlueLinx’s new master data management platform is designed to streamline internal processes, while the company’s ecommerce platform, currently in its pilot phase, is set to provide customers with a more convenient way to purchase building products online.

data.title: Survey: Consumers share how tariffs have already impacted their online shopping behaviors
data.description: With the vast majority of consumers surveyed saying the tariffs driving up prices, 56.5% want retailers to offer U.S.-sourced alternatives.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What tariffs mean to consumers in new survey
data.description: Tariffs have already meant price increases for a majority of online shoppers, with 35.8% calling those price increases significant.

data.title: Builders FirstSource names a digital strategy and ecommerce leader
data.description: Narayan has more than 20 years of experience in digital and enterprise technology leadership. She previously held leadership roles at PepsiCo, Microsoft and Amazon.

data.title: DHL: AI, social media, and delivery demands redefine ecommerce
data.description: 70% of respondents say they expect to do most of their shopping through social media platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and Facebook by 2030.
